---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a feature or improvement for Late-Meet \U0001F680 Share workflow ideas,
  UI enhancements, AI features, or productivity improvements with as much detail as
  possible."
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, gssoc
assignees: ''

---

📌 Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation you’re facing.

Examples:

What is currently missing?
What workflow feels frustrating?
What could be improved?

Example:

“I’m always frustrated when meeting summaries cannot be exported automatically.”

💡 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution or feature you would like to see implemented.

Examples:

New functionality
UI/UX improvements
Productivity enhancements
AI workflow ideas
Dashboard improvements

Be as clear and specific as possible.

🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions, workarounds, or approaches you’ve considered.

This helps maintainers better understand:

design tradeoffs,
possible implementation directions,
and feature expectations.
🛠️ Implementation Ideas (Optional)

If you have technical ideas for implementation, feel free to share them.

Examples:

architecture suggestions,
API integrations,
UI concepts,
component ideas,
or workflow logic.

This section is optional but highly appreciated 💙

📸 Mockups / Screenshots

If applicable, attach:

screenshots,
wireframes,
UI mockups,
diagrams,
or reference images

to help visualize the feature.

📝 Additional Context

Add any additional context, references, or related information here.

Examples:

related tools/features,
GitHub discussions,
user workflows,
browser limitations,
or external references.
📊 Difficulty Estimate

How complex do you think this feature might be?

🟢 Beginner — Good first issue
🟡 Intermediate — Requires some familiarity with the codebase
🔴 Advanced — Significant architecture or system-level work
🏷️ Metadata
Default Issue Title: [FEATURE]
Recommended Labels: enhancement
Assignees: Maintainers will review and assign contributors when appropriate.

Thank you for helping improve Late-Meet 🚀
